metadata.title: I Love The Nightlife (Disco 'Round)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:09.94] Please don't talk about love tonight
[00:13.60] Please don't talk about sweet love
[00:17.52] Please don't talk about bein' true
[00:21.40] And all the trouble, we've been through
[00:24.32] Ah, please don't talk about all of the plans
[00:28.43] We had, for fixin' this broken romance
[00:33.10] I want to go where the people dance
[00:35.93] I want some action, I want to live
[00:40.76] Action, I got so much to give
[00:44.51] I want to give it, I want to get some too
[00:48.43] Oh I, oh I, I love the nightlife
[00:53.93] I got to boogie, on the disco 'round, oh yeah
[01:01.06] Oh, I love the nightlife
[01:03.73] I got to boogie, on the disco 'round, oh yeah
[01:13.06] Please don't talk about love tonight
[01:17.00] Your sweet talkin' won't make it right
[01:20.89] Love and lies just bring me down
[01:24.36] When you've got women all over town
[01:28.08] You can love them all and when you're through
[01:31.79] Maybe that'll make, huh, a man out of you
[01:36.06] I got to go where the people dance
[01:39.24] I want some action, I want to live
[01:43.85] Action, I got so much to give
[01:47.95] I want to give it, I want to get some too
[01:53.95] Oh I, I love the nightlife
[01:57.48] I got to boogie, on the disco 'round, oh yeah
[02:04.25] Oh, I love the nightlife
[02:07.02] I got to boogie, on the disco 'round, oh yeah
[02:33.18] Oh, I love the nightlife
[02:35.92] I got to boogie, on the disco 'round, yeah
[02:42.73] Oh, I love the nightlife
[02:45.64] I got to boogie, on the disco 'round, yeah, yeah
[02:52.87] I love the nightlife
[02:55.28] Got to boogie, on the disco 'round, oh yeah
[03:02.10] Oh, I love the nightlife...
